name: Thomson Reuters Westlaw & Legal Data API
what_it_does: Thomson Reuters Westlaw REST APIs for legal research, analytics, and intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage legal research queries across comprehensive US and international case law, statutes, and regulatory databases, handle KeyCite citation validation for case precedent currency and negative treatment, access Westlaw Edge AI-assisted legal analytics including judge and court analytics, retrieve Practical Law workflow guides and practice materials for legal process automation, access court document and docket retrieval for litigation monitoring, handle legal entity and corporate intelligence via Dun & Bradstreet integration, retrieve regulatory tracking and legislative monitoring data for compliance, access legal news and law review content for legal intelligence, manage Thomson Reuters ONESOURCE tax research and compliance data, and integrate legal research with practice management, contract lifecycle, and compliance platforms.
use_cases: Researching legal precedent from litigation support agents
Validating case citations from legal drafting agents
Monitoring regulatory changes from compliance automation agents
Retrieving court analytics from litigation strategy agents
not_for: Non-legal applications without licensed legal database need
Budget-constrained projects where Westlaw per-search costs are prohibitive
Consumer legal research without institutional licensing
best_when: A law firm, corporate legal department, government agency, or legal technology company using Westlaw Edge wants AI agents to automate legal research, citation validation, regulatory monitoring, litigation analytics, and Practical Law workflow integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: Westlaw legal research results require attorney interpretation — automated legal conclusions from case law API results without licensed attorney review create unauthorized practice of law risks. KeyCite must be used to validate any case citation before reliance in legal proceedings; automated citation without KeyCite validation risks citing bad law. Regulatory monitoring automation requires attorney review of regulatory changes before compliance action.

auth.notes: Thomson Reuters Westlaw APIs use OAuth 2.0 with scopes. Developer portal at developer.thomsonreuters.com. Eagan, Minnesota (TR Legal HQ) / Toronto (TR HQ). Public (TRI NYSE/TSX). Westlaw Edge is the AI-enhanced Westlaw platform. TR also provides ONESOURCE (tax), Checkpoint (tax/audit), Reuters News, and financial data APIs. Competes with LexisNexis for legal research market. KeyCite is TR's citation service (Westlaw equivalent of Shepard's).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — institutional subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription or per-search pricing; Westlaw Edge premium pricing above standard Westlaw
pricing.notes: Eagan, Minnesota / Toronto. Thomson Reuters (TRI NYSE/TSX). $6.5B+ annual revenue (Legal segment $3B+). Westlaw is the leading US legal research platform. Westlaw Edge adds AI analytics (WL Edge AI). Practical Law acquired 2012. Reuters News. ONESOURCE tax. FindLaw. Major legal intelligence and news provider. Competes with LexisNexis for global legal research and analytics market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; subscription tier dependent

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Legal research results are for attorney analysis — automated legal conclusions without licensed counsel review constitute unauthorized practice of law

KeyCite mandatory for citation use — always validate case citations through KeyCite before any use in legal documents; automated legal drafting without KeyCite citation checking risks citing overruled precedent
Westlaw vs. Westlaw Edge distinction — Westlaw Edge includes AI analytics (WL Edge AI) and analytics features not in standard Westlaw; verify subscription tier for access to analytics capabilities
Practical Law content licensing — Practical Law workflow guides require separate licensing; standard Westlaw access may not include Practical Law content
Search relevance vs. comprehensiveness — Westlaw AI search returns relevance-ranked results; comprehensive legal research requires iterative query refinement beyond single API calls
International law coverage — Westlaw US coverage is comprehensive; international jurisdiction coverage varies significantly; verify jurisdiction coverage for non-US legal research
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal research and analytics. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/UK/CA. Case law, court, and legal intelligence data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal research. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Case law and legal analytics data.
